properties.name: dmx.fun.tx-result.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a TxResult bean. Set to false to disable it entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.tx-try.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a TxTry bean. Set to false to disable it entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.tx-validated.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure a TxValidated bean. Set to false to disable it entirely.

properties.name: dmx.fun.aspect.enabled
properties.description: Whether to auto-configure the DmxTransactionalAspect bean. Set to false to disable @TransactionalResult, @TransactionalTry, and @TransactionalValidated AOP support entirely.
